spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Avoid clutter, prioritize optical alignment. Utilize full screen estate for data without cramping.

sidebar.style: bg-white border-r border-slate-200 w-64 flex flex-col h-screen
sidebar.items: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-card transition-shadow hover:shadow-hover
cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-50 flex justify-between items-center

kpi_tiles.layout: flex items-center justify-between p-6 bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-card
kpi_tiles.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 mt-1
kpi_tiles.icon_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 text-slate-600

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm
tables.header: bg-slate-50/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 font-semibold text-left py-4 px-6 border-b border-slate-200
tables.row: border-b border-slate-100 last:border-0 hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.severity: Use severity_and_status colors (e.g., bg-[#FFE4E6] text-[#E11D48] for Critical)
badges.status: Use active/inactive colors (e.g., bg-[#DBEAFE] text-[#2563EB] for Active)

map_container.style: w-full h-full min-h-[400px] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 shadow-inner bg-slate-50 relative
map_container.controls: Mapbox/Leaflet controls should be minimal, top-right aligned. Custom markers based on severity and role.
map_container.overlays: Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border border-white/40) for floating cards over the map

modals.content: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-modal w-full max-w-lg mx-auto overflow-hidden animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200

interactive_states.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[2px]) on cards, color shifts on buttons (lighter shade of primary)

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for a clean, professional look. Avoid solid icons.

login_background.description: Abstract white spiral minimal graphic. Use as the background for the unified Login/Auth screens, preferably with a white/50 backdrop blur overlay.

empty_state_illustration.description: Elegant minimalist scene with white geometric shapes. Use inside an img tag with a rounded mask for empty states like 'No Active Incidents' or 'No Patients'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in light mode exclusively as per the problem statement.
Use Manrope for all headings and Figtree for body text. Do not use Inter or generic sans.

Structure the frontend repo with a master layout that handles multi-dashboard routing. Each dashboard (Police, Fire, Ambulance, Hospital, Super Admin) must feel isolated but share the same base component anatomy.
Inject the specific 'role_identities' colors into the active states and key buttons of each respective dashboard (e.g., Police dashboard uses #0369A1 for active sidebar links and primary buttons).
For the Leaflet map, style the container with rounded-2xl and a subtle border. Use glassmorphism for any floating cards over the map.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but strip away heavy borders; ensure rounded-xl / rounded-lg usage.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Do not use card components where a simple flat layout is better. Cards are only for distinct modular widgets or KPI tiles.
Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) for analytics, applying the role's primary color as the main chart color.
